name: ntplib
documentation:
# ntplib - Python NTP library

## Description

This module offers a simple interface to query NTP servers from Python.

It also provides utility functions to translate NTP fields values to text (mode,
leap indicator...). Since it's pure Python, and only depends on core modules, it
should work on any platform with a Python implementation.

## Example

```pycon
>>> import ntplib
>>> from time import ctime
>>> c = ntplib.NTPClient()
>>> response = c.request('europe.pool.ntp.org', version=3)
>>> response.offset
-0.143156766891
>>> response.version
3
>>> ctime(response.tx_time)
'Sun May 17 09:32:48 2009'
>>> ntplib.leap_to_text(response.leap)
'no warning'
>>> response.root_delay
0.0046844482421875
>>> ntplib.ref_id_to_text(response.ref_id)
193.190.230.66
```

## Installation

As root:

```
# python setup.py install
```

or just copy ntplib.py inside a directory in your sys.path, e.g.
`/usr/lib/python2.5/`.

modules.name: ntplib
documentation:
Python NTP library.

Implementation of client-side NTP (RFC-1305), and useful NTP-related
functions.

functions.name: ntplib._to_int
documentation:
Return the integral part of a timestamp.

Parameters:
timestamp -- NTP timestamp

Retuns:
integral part

functions.name: ntplib._to_frac
documentation:
Return the fractional part of a timestamp.

Parameters:
timestamp -- NTP timestamp
n         -- number of bits of the fractional part

Retuns:
fractional part

functions.name: ntplib._to_time
documentation:
Return a timestamp from an integral and fractional part.

Parameters:
integ -- integral part
frac  -- fractional part
n     -- number of bits of the fractional part

Retuns:
timestamp

functions.name: ntplib.ntp_to_system_time
documentation:
Convert a NTP time to system time.

Parameters:
timestamp -- timestamp in NTP time

Returns:
corresponding system time

functions.name: ntplib.system_to_ntp_time
documentation:
Convert a system time to a NTP time.

Parameters:
timestamp -- timestamp in system time

Returns:
corresponding NTP time

functions.name: ntplib.leap_to_text
documentation:
Convert a leap indicator to text.

Parameters:
leap -- leap indicator value

Returns:
corresponding message

Raises:
NTPException -- in case of invalid leap indicator

functions.name: ntplib.mode_to_text
documentation:
Convert a NTP mode value to text.

Parameters:
mode -- NTP mode

Returns:
corresponding message

Raises:
NTPException -- in case of invalid mode

functions.name: ntplib.stratum_to_text
documentation:
Convert a stratum value to text.

Parameters:
stratum -- NTP stratum

Returns:
corresponding message

Raises:
NTPException -- in case of invalid stratum

functions.name: ntplib.ref_id_to_text
documentation:
Convert a reference clock identifier to text according to its stratum.

Parameters:
ref_id  -- reference clock indentifier
stratum -- NTP stratum

Returns:
corresponding message

Raises:
NTPException -- in case of invalid stratum

documentation:
Constructor.

Parameters:
version      -- NTP version

methods.name: ntplib.NTPPacket.to_data
documentation:
Convert this NTPPacket to a buffer that can be sent over a socket.

Returns:
buffer representing this packet

Raises:
NTPException -- in case of invalid field

methods.name: ntplib.NTPPacket.from_data
documentation:
Populate this instance from a NTP packet payload received from
the network.

Parameters:
data -- buffer payload

Raises:
NTPException -- in case of invalid packet format

NTP packet class.

This represents an NTP packet.

Wrapper for NTPPacket, offering additional statistics like offset and
delay, and timestamps converted to system time.
